probes.name: basic_path_analysis
probes.prompt: Hey, can you analyze @captures/room_latest.jpg and tell me what you see in the image?
probes.criteria:
The agent's role is to resolve @-prefixed relative image paths to absolute paths and call the analyze_image MCP tool. A good response resolves the relative path 'captures/room_latest.jpg' to an absolute filesystem path, calls the MCP tool, and returns a clear plain-text description of the image contents.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by messages 4, 12, 19, 29 where user asks about camera captures and screenshots from the server camera.

probes.name: multiple_images_comparison
probes.prompt: I have two captures from the security camera. Can you look at @cam/entrance_before.jpg and @cam/entrance_after.jpg and describe what changed between them?
probes.criteria:
The agent's role is to resolve @-prefixed relative image paths and call analyze_image MCP. A good response resolves BOTH relative paths to absolute paths, calls the MCP tool for each image, and provides plain-text descriptions that allow the user to understand the differences between the two captures.

probes.name: hardware_component_identification
probes.prompt: Hey, I just took a photo of my server rack with the USB camera. The capture is at @captures/server_rack_2026-06-10.png. Can you analyze it and tell me if you can identify what hardware components are visible, specifically the GPU and any LED status indicators?

The agent's role is to resolve @-prefixed relative image paths and call analyze_image MCP. probes.name: ambient_lighting_check
